title: A Ghost Ship and a Living Skeleton
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Sanji, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #6 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Dogs are dogs. There, there, there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Aside from that, what terrible wounds.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It's a wonder that it's alive.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's not even a valid creature anymore.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Then I'm looking forward to this island!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Nami-San, Heeey!! Nami-San, where are you!!?
